name: EPIC Dashboard Plugin — Full AI Suite (+ PDF Upload & Live Consultation)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ panels: [{ id: 'risk-score', label: 'Risk Score', title: 'Sepsis Risk Score', description: 'Vitals-based sepsis screening — latest readings only', webhook: 'risk-score-run', trigger: 'auto' },{ id: 'care-gaps', label: 'Care Gaps', title: 'Care Gap Analysis', description: 'Preventive care items the patient may be overdue for', webhook: 'care-gaps-run', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Check Care Gaps' },{ id: 'discharge-summary', label: 'Discharge Summary', title: 'AI Discharge Summary', description: 'AI-generated discharge summary from patient record', webhook: 'discharge-summary', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Generate Summary' },{ id: 'previsit-summary', label: 'Pre-Visit Summary', title: 'AI Pre-Visit Brief', description: 'AI-generated pre-visit briefing for providers', webhook: 'previsit-summary', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Generate Brief' },{ id: 'pdf-report', label: 'PDF Report', title: 'Upload PDF Report', description: 'Extract and import lab/vital data from a PDF report', webhook: 'process-report', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Upload Report' },{ id: 'live-consultation', label: 'Live Consultation', title: 'Live Doctor–Patient Consultation', description: 'Real-time transcription with AI clinical notes and chart updates', webhook: 'generate-clinical-notes', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Start Consultation' }] }) }}

parameters.text: ={{ 'Generate a discharge summary from the following FHIR patient data:\n\n' + $json.context }}

options.systemMessage: You are a clinical documentation specialist. Write a professional hospital discharge summary in clear clinical language. Structure the summary with these clearly labeled sections: REASON FOR ADMISSION, HOSPITAL COURSE, SIGNIFICANT FINDINGS (vitals and labs), DISCHARGE MEDICATIONS, ALLERGIES, FOLLOW-UP INSTRUCTIONS, and DISCHARGE CONDITION. Be concise and clinically accurate. Do not invent information not present in the data.

You are a clinical data extraction specialist. Extract ONLY clearly numeric lab and vital sign values from the PDF text. Return ONLY a valid, complete JSON object — no markdown fences, no explanation, nothing else. Schema (extract up to 30 items max):
{
  "reportDate": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "summary": "one-line description",
  "extracted": [
    { "name": "Test Name", "value": 0.0, "unit": "unit", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "isNew": true }
  ]
}
Rules:
- value MUST be a number (float or int), never a string
- date must be YYYY-MM-DD; if multiple dates exist use the most recent
- isNew = true for all items
- Omit items where value cannot be parsed as a number
- Keep test names short (under 60 chars)
- IMPORTANT: Close the JSON properly — ensure all arrays and objects are closed

You are a clinical documentation specialist. Generate a SOAP-format clinical note from the consultation transcript provided. Return ONLY an HTML string (no markdown, no JSON wrapper) using this structure:

S – Subjective

Patient's chief complaint and history in their words...

O – Objective

Objective findings mentioned (vitals, observations)...

A – Assessment

Clinical impression and diagnoses discussed...

P – Plan

Treatment plan, medications ordered, follow-up...

Use clean HTML. Do not invent clinical details not present in the transcript.
={{ 'Generate a SOAP clinical note for patient ' + $json.patientName + ' (ID: ' + $json.patientId + ') from this consultation transcript:\n\n' + $json.transcript }}
={{ 'Extract chart updates for patient ' + $json.patientName + ' (ID: ' + $json.patientId + ') from this consultation transcript:\n\n' + $json.transcript }}
